name: Classic Sour Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Shortbread cookie crumbs, about 24 cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine; press firmly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixer bowl, beat cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Beat in eggs, then sour cream, and vanilla.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until lightly browned around the edge (center will be slightly soft).
8. Cool. Chill. Garnish as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
Lisa Howard (DJTW74A); 3-6-95
